## Rule Name
<!-- e.g., no-console-log, no-debug-statements -->
`no-<name>`

## Cycle
<!-- Which cycle should this rule belong to? -->
- [ ] Cycle 1 (Code Quality)
- [ ] Cycle 2 (Security)
- [ ] Cycle 4 (Research Claims)

## What It Should Block
<!-- Describe the pattern that should be blocked -->

## Regex Pattern (if you have one)
```javascript
/your-pattern-here/
```

## Examples

### Should be BLOCKED:
```
// paste code that should trigger the rule
```

### Should be ALLOWED:
```
// paste code that should NOT trigger the rule
```

<!-- Why is this pattern dangerous or bad practice? -->
